calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-117 Wanting/Liking Dissociation Replication (seeds [1,2,3])
items.notes: Independent replication of EXQ-074f (seeds [42,7,13]) with seeds [1,2,3]. Same design: 3000 steps, 6x6 grid, L1->L2 relocation at step 1500. Wanting chases L1 (incentive salience); liking redirects to L2. PASS: 4/4 criteria in >= 2/3 seeds. Supports MECH-117 stable promotion. evidence_direction_per_claim for MECH-112 and MECH-117.

items.title: MECH-112 / ARC-030: Clean Learned-Goal Gate (Paper Gate)
items.notes: Paper gate for learned goal-directed behavior. GOAL_ACTIVE (harm+benefit+z_goal selector) vs GOAL_ABLATED (same selector, goal channel zeroed). 8x8 grid, 1 resource, 5 seeds, early-acquisition metrics (success@40, first-hit latency, goal_resource_corr alignment probe). Nearby variant: 2 hazards. Fixes EXQ-225/226 design flaws: matched selector structure, simpler environment, no multi-resource confound. CRITICAL: config.e1.goal_dim=world_dim set after from_dims() for GOAL_ACTIVE (pattern from EXQ-076f fix).

items.title: ARC-018 Rollout Fidelity Gate (ROLLOUT_k5 vs GREEDY_k1, E2-quality-stratified)
items.notes: Conflict resolution for EXQ-120 PASS vs EXQ-172/196 FAIL. ROLLOUT_k5 (HippocampalModule CEM horizon=5, E3.select()) vs GREEDY_k1 (1-step E2.world_forward + E3.harm_eval, argmin). Shared trained modules, residue field ACTIVE in both. proximity_harm_scale=0.0 (point-source harm only, fixes EXQ-196 saturation). Harm counted as direct env_caused_hazard contacts. E2-quality-gating diagnostic: Pearson(per-seed r2, per-seed advantage). 5 seeds x 250 train + 30 eval eps.

items.title: MECH-163: Dual Goal-Directed Systems Discrimination (2x2: SIMPLE/LONG_HORIZON x HABIT/PLANNED)
items.notes: Bug fix of EXQ-237: hazard_harm=0.5 -> 0.02 (premature episode termination at ~18 steps). 2x2 factorial: context (SIMPLE 2res/1haz/80steps vs LONG_HORIZON 1res/3haz/150steps) x policy (HABIT z_goal=False/benefit_eval=True vs PLANNED z_goal=True/e1_goal_cond=True). Full agent pipeline eval (generate_trajectories+select_action). Tests MECH-163 interaction: planned advantage specifically in long-horizon context. Criteria: C1 goal_norm>=0.05, C3 lift_long>=0.05, C4 interaction>0.02, C5 harm_ratio<=1.5, majority 2/3 seeds.

items.title: Toroidal Minimal Vertebrate Cognition Ablation -- no-wall replication of EXQ-223
items.notes: Replicates EXQ-223 with toroidal=True (no walls, wrapping edges). Tests whether EXQ-223 PASS was genuine gradient-following or wall-hugging artifact. Secondary question: does agent develop row/column preference in open torus?

items.title: ARC-032 theta-rate pathway behavioral test (THETA_ACTIVE vs THETA_ZEROED)
items.notes: Fix of EXQ-228 metric-ablation mismatch: compute_prediction_loss() has zero dependency on theta_buffer (E1 internal MSE). Fix: switch to behavioral outcomes (resource_rate, harm_rate) via full generate_trajectories+select_action pipeline. Between-agents: both trained from scratch with identical greedy/random warmup. THETA_ZEROED patches theta_buffer.summary() to return zeros -- severs E1->theta->E3 context pathway. C1: lift>=0.05 in >=2/3 seeds. Precondition: z_goal_norm>=0.05 in THETA_ACTIVE.

items.title: ARC-029 committed-mode harm redesign (8 hazards, 5 seeds, majority rule)
items.notes: Redesign to fix low statistical power under SD-010/011/012 substrate. num_hazards 4->8, hazard_harm 0.02->0.05, proximity_harm_scale 0.05->0.15. Seeds [0,42,100,123,200] with majority rule C1/C2/C3>=4/5 seeds. MIN_HARM_GAP_STABLE raised 0.0001->0.001. harm_obs passed to sense() (SD-010 nociceptive stream active). EXQ-125 failed 3x: harm rates ~100x smaller than EXQ-063 due to substrate, making committed-gate advantage undetectable.

items.title: SD-012 drive_weight ablation fix (proximity_benefit_scale corrected)
items.notes: Fix for EXQ-233 design error: adds proximity_benefit_scale=0.18 so benefit_exposure exceeds seeding threshold. SD012_ACTIVE (drive_weight=2.0) vs SD012_ABLATED (drive_weight=0.0). Expected: ACTIVE seeds z_goal (norm>0.1), ABLATED does not (norm<0.05). Clean causal ablation proof.

items.title: ARC-038 Waking Consolidation Mode Probe (CONSOLIDATE vs NO_CONSOLIDATE offline map update)
items.note: Redesign of EXQ-191: implements offline consolidation pass (no z_goal, updates residue field from trajectory buffer via hippocampal.replay() + residue_field.integrate()), reachable target_harm_rate=0.05, diagnostic classification. 5 seeds x 200 episodes, CONSOLIDATE fires every 10 episodes.

items.title: SD-011 Dual Nociceptive Stream Proof-of-Concept (z_harm_s sensory-discriminative vs z_harm_a affective-motivational)
items.note: Diagnostic POC: implements dual-stream harm encoder (z_harm_s=fast/localizable via HarmEncoder, z_harm_a=slow EMA via AffectiveHarmEncoder) as standalone encoders on existing CausalGridWorldV2 observations. Tests orthogonality (D1: cos_sim < 0.5), sensory forward-predictability (D2: R2_s > 0.3), and differential predictability (D3: R2_a < R2_s). No ree_core changes required.

items.title: SD-017 Minimal Sleep Phase Ablation (SWS-analog + REM-analog vs waking-only)
items.notes: SD-017 minimal sleep phase ablation. Three conditions: WAKING_ONLY, SWS_ONLY, SWS_THEN_REM. Two-context alternating environment (SAFE: 1 hazard vs DANGEROUS: 8 hazards). SWS-analog: interleaved SAFE/DANGEROUS writes to E1.context_memory (schema slot differentiation, hip->cx direction). REM-analog: targeted harm_eval gradient updates on DANGEROUS harm events in temporal order, plus residue_field.integrate() (slot-filling, cx->hip direction). Primary measure: slot_cosine_sim (lower=more differentiated). Secondary: harm_rate_dangerous, harm_discrimination. PASS: C1 (SWS slot differentiation) AND (C2 harm benefit OR C4 discrimination improvement). Diagnostic: SD-017 not yet first-class substrate component -- tests existing context_memory.write + harm_eval hooks as minimal proxy.

items.title: INV-045 Phase Ordering Necessity + MECH-123 Precision Recalibration
items.note: Five conditions: WAKING_ONLY, REM_ONLY, REM_THEN_SWS (wrong order), SWS_THEN_REM (correct), SWS_THEN_REM_RECAL (+MECH-123 precision reset). PASS=P1(REM_ONLY fails)+P2(wrong order fails)+P3(correct order wins). MECH-123 via P4. Direct evidence test of INV-045.

items.title: MECH-165 Reverse Replay Diversity (Forward vs Balanced forward+reverse)
items.note: Three conditions: WAKING_ONLY, FORWARD_ONLY_REPLAY, BALANCED_REPLAY (forward+reverse). Measures action_entropy and monostrategy_rate. PASS: BALANCED > FORWARD on entropy (M1) AND (monostrategy_rate lower M2 OR entropy > waking M3). Reverse replay traces back from harm events to causal antecedents, enabling alternative route identification.

items.title: MECH-120 SHY-Analog Normalisation Phase Ordering (SHY before vs after SWS)
items.note: Four conditions: WAKING_ONLY, SWS_NO_SHY, SHY_THEN_SWS (correct order), SWS_THEN_SHY (wrong order). Uses shy_normalise(decay=0.85) substrate addition. PASS: SHY_THEN_SWS has lower slot_cosine_sim than SWS_NO_SHY (S1) AND lower than SWS_THEN_SHY (S2) in >=2/3 seeds. Tests that SHY homeostasis before SWS is functionally necessary.

items.title: MECH-122 Phase 3 Spindle Coordination Proxy (ThetaBuffer consolidation_summary->ContextMemory)
items.note: Three conditions: WAKING_ONLY, SWS_REM_NO_SPINDLE, SWS_REM_WITH_SPINDLE. Phase 3 proxy: theta_buffer.set_consolidation_mode(True), consolidation_summary() (recency-weighted z_world), write back to ContextMemory. PASS: Phase 3 does not worsen harm avoidance (T1) AND maintains/improves harm discrimination (T2). Deliberately weak criteria -- MECH-122 full effect is V4 scope. Establishes V3 proxy baseline.

items.title: SD-011/SD-012 Full Integration Validation (urgency gating + affective amplification + drive extraction)
items.notes: First experiment exercising full SD-011/SD-012 co-design wired through E3. 4-arm: FULL (urgency+affective+drive) vs NO_URGENCY vs NO_AFFECT vs BASELINE. Tests z_harm_a urgency lowers commit threshold under threat (C1), affective amplification raises M(zeta) (C2), drive extraction enables z_goal seeding (C3), backward compat (C4), threshold separation (C5). 3 seeds x 200 train + 50 eval x 200 steps. PASS: all C1-C5.
